repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Child Care and Economic Development Project

did.abstract: Correspondence, proposals, memoranda, conference material concerning the Child Care and Economic Development project.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Professor in the Dept. of City and Regional Planning, Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, proposals, memoranda, conference material concerning the Child Care and Economic Development project.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Mildred Warner papers, 1997-2006, #15-2-3719. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
